title: Steps Guide Layout — AI Output Schema
description: The exact JSON structure Claude must return for the steps-guide layout. No HTML. No CSS. Content only.

title.description: Hero title. Start with a verb when possible: 'How to...', 'Set Up...', 'Master...'. 1–2 lines max.

subtitle.description: 1–2 sentences. What the reader will be able to do after following this guide.

label.description: Eyebrow label: 'HOW TO', '5 STEPS', '10-MINUTE GUIDE', etc.

hero_icon.description: Single icon that best represents the guide's end goal.

sections.description: 4–6 numbered steps. Each step has a number, title, body text, and icon. Cover the full process without skipping important steps or adding filler steps.

title.description: Step title. Start with an action verb: 'Create...', 'Configure...', 'Connect...'. 3–6 words.

body.description: What to do and why. Specific. No fluff. 1–2 sentences max.

icon.description: Icon specific to this step's action — not a repeat of other steps.

stats.description: Exactly 3 stats. Time to complete, number of steps, or key outcome metrics.

callout.description: A pro tip, common mistake to avoid, or key insight. Not a summary.

examples.title: Deploy Your First App on Vercel
examples.subtitle: From zero to live in 5 steps — no DevOps experience required
examples.label: DEPLOYMENT GUIDE

sections.title: Create a Vercel Account
sections.body: Sign up at vercel.com — the free Hobby plan covers most personal projects with no credit card needed.

sections.title: Connect Your Git Repository
sections.body: Import from GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket. Vercel reads your framework automatically and sets sensible defaults.

sections.title: Configure Environment Variables
sections.body: Add API keys and secrets in Project Settings → Environment Variables. Never commit these to your repo.

sections.title: Trigger Your First Deploy
sections.body: Push any commit to main. Vercel builds and deploys in under 60 seconds — you'll see a live preview URL immediately.

sections.title: Set Up a Custom Domain
sections.body: Add your domain in Project Settings → Domains. SSL is provisioned automatically within minutes.

callout.title: Common Mistake
callout.body: Never push environment variables to Git. Use Vercel's dashboard to store secrets — even a single accidental commit exposes your API keys permanently.
